title: tf.clip_by_value  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1

parameters.name: t
parameters.description:
Given a ensort, this operation returns a tensor of the same type and
shape astwith its values clipped toclip_value_minandclip_value_max.
Any values less thanclip_value_minare set toclip_value_min. Any
